name_en: ❤️Chanel 2021 Fall/Winter New Ap,,2303💞 Gold ball makeup box Small storage box Hardware Imported sheepskin Open on the street for touch-ups, close for styling, can also be used as storage at home. Lipstick, BB cream, foundation, tissues, all can be stored. Looks great when worn, very versatile. Dimensions: 17*9.5*8cm
